description_long: This is a light tan, tracked combat tactical vehicle resembling a World War II-era tank, featuring a prominent cylindrical turret with a long-barreled main cannon. The hull is angular with visible hatches, periscopes, and various surface details such as bolts and access panels. The vehicle rides on a set of large, interleaved road wheels and continuous metal tracks, with side skirts partially covering the suspension. The rear section includes a visible exhaust system and stowage compartments, while the turret has a cupola and additional hatches. The surface appears weathered, with dirt and wear marks, suggesting operational use. No visible military markings or camouflage patterns are present, and the vehicle is painted in a solid, dusty tan color.
description: A tan, tracked combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret, long cannon, and weathered surface, resembling a WWII-era tank. It features detailed tracks, hatches, and a solid paint scheme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, sloped glacis plate, and frontal hatches with headlights on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, road wheels, side skirts, and the turret's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the exhaust system, rear stowage, and the back of the turret and hull.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the tracks, wheels, and the turret with its cannon extending forward.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped surfaces on the front and turret; appears thick and robust, with visible bolts and reinforced panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color; no visible camouflage pattern.
